titleEn: Latest sole-author JPCL paper selected as the issue front cover
titleZh: 最新单人作者 JPCL 论文入选整期 Front Cover
summaryEn: Hengyue Xu's latest sole-author paper, also his fourth sole-author paper to date, was selected by ACS Publications for the front cover of an issue of The Journal of Physical Chemistry Letters.
summaryZh: 徐恒越最新单人作者论文，也是迄今第 4 篇单人作者论文，被 ACS Publications 选为 The Journal of Physical Chemistry Letters 的整期 Front Cover。

titleEn: Energy & Fuels cover highlights a first-author hydrogen-evolution study
titleZh: Energy & Fuels 封面展示第一作者析氢研究
summaryEn: Hengyue Xu's first-author paper on theoretical core-shell 3d-metal nanocluster design for efficient hydrogen evolution was selected as an Energy & Fuels cover paper.
summaryZh: 徐恒越作为第一作者的高效析氢核壳 3d 金属纳米簇理论设计论文入选 Energy & Fuels 封面论文。

titleEn: Small cover highlights a last-author corresponding-author paper
titleZh: Small 封面展示末位通讯作者论文
summaryEn: Hengyue Xu's last-author corresponding-author paper, The Dual-Site Adsorption and High Redox Activity Enabled by Hybrid Organic-Inorganic Vanadyl Ethylene Glycolate for High-Rate and Long-Durability Lithium-Sulfur Batteries, was selected as a Small cover paper.
summaryZh: 徐恒越作为末位通讯作者的 The Dual-Site Adsorption and High Redox Activity Enabled by Hybrid Organic-Inorganic Vanadyl Ethylene Glycolate for High-Rate and Long-Durability Lithium-Sulfur Batteries 入选 Small 封面论文。
